Description: Unique patient identifier
Patient age in years at time of waitlist placement
Patient biological sex
Patient race/ethnicity
Values/Range: White, Black, Hispanic, Asian, Native American

Description: ABO blood type
Body mass index at listing (kg/m^2)
Primary cause of end-stage renal disease
Values/Range: Diabetes, Hypertension, Glomerulonephritis, Polycystic Kidney, Other

Description: Diabetes diagnosis (Yes if cause_of_esrd is Diabetes or comorbid diabetes)
Hypertension diagnosis
History of cardiovascular disease (CAD, CHF, PVD, or CVA)
Hepatitis C antibody positive
History of prior kidney transplant (re-transplant candidate)
Type of dialysis at time of listing
Months on dialysis before waitlist placement; 0 = preemptive listing
Primary insurance/payer at listing
UNOS/OPTN region (1-11)
Calendar year of initial waitlist placement
Calculated Panel Reactive Antibody percentage (sensitization level); higher = harder to match
Patient outcome/disposition as of study end
Values/Range: Transplanted (Deceased Donor), Transplanted (Living Donor), Died on Waitlist, Removed from Waitlist, Still Waiting

Description: Days from waitlist placement to event or censoring
Death indicator: 1 = patient died (on waitlist or post-transplant), 0 = alive/censored
Days from listing to transplant (blank if not transplanted)
Source Reference: SRTR SAF: derived from REC_TX_DT - CAN_LISTING_DT

Description: Deceased donor age in years (blank if not transplanted or living donor)
Donor death type (blank if not transplanted with deceased donor)
Values/Range: DBD (Donation after Brain Death), DCD (Donation after Circulatory Death)

Description: Kidney Donor Profile Index percentile (0=best longevity, 100=worst); blank if not transplanted
Hours kidney was preserved ex vivo before transplant (blank if not transplanted)
Whether recipient required dialysis within 7 days post-transplant (blank if not transplanted)
Days of survival after transplant (blank if not transplanted)
Source Reference: SRTR SAF: derived from TFL_LAFUDATE - REC_TX_DT

Description: Transplant center / dialysis facility identifier
Number of hospital admissions in the past 12 months
